global_rules.design_tone: High-end, authoritative, professional, $50K+ immigration consultancy grade. No generic SaaS slop.

layout.structure: Grid-based Unified Cockpit with Sticky Panels
layout.sidebar_left: w-16 md:w-64 border-r border-[#E2E8F0] bg-white flex flex-col justify-between shrink-0 transition-all
layout.main_content: flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0 bg-[#F8FAFC] overflow-hidden
layout.sidebar_right: w-80 border-l border-[#E2E8F0] bg-[#F8FAFC] shrink-0 hidden lg:flex flex-col sticky top-0 h-screen overflow-y-auto

top_bar.container: h-16 border-b border-[#E2E8F0] bg-white flex items-center justify-between px-6 shrink-0
top_bar.new_client_btn: bg-[#2563EB] text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-semibold text-sm hover:bg-[#1E40FF] shadow-sm transition-colors flex items-center gap-2

funnel_bar.container: flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2 scrollbar-hide w-full
funnel_bar.item: px-4 py-2 rounded-lg border border-[#E2E8F0] bg-white text-sm font-semibold text-[#475569] flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer hover:border-[#2563EB] hover:text-[#2563EB] transition-colors whitespace-nowrap
funnel_bar.active_item: bg-[#EFF6FF] border-[#2563EB] text-[#1E40FF] shadow-sm ring-1 ring-[#2563EB]/20
funnel_bar.badge: px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-[#F1F5F9] text-xs font-bold text-[#64748B]

pipeline_card.container: bg-white p-4 rounded-xl border border-[#E2E8F0] shadow-[0_1px_3px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] hover:shadow-md hover:border-[#2563EB] transition-all cursor-grab group flex flex-col gap-3
pipeline_card.title: text-base font-bold text-[#1E1B4B] leading-tight
pipeline_card.score_badge: flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-bold text-[#D97706] bg-[#FEF3C7] px-2 py-1 rounded-md border border-[#FDE68A]

lifecycle_tracker.container: flex justify-between items-center w-full gap-1 pt-2

pipeline_card.footer: flex justify-between items-center pt-3 border-t border-[#F1F5F9] mt-1
pipeline_card.cta: text-xs font-bold text-[#2563EB] hover:text-[#1E40FF] flex items-center gap-1
pipeline_card.avatar: w-6 h-6 rounded-full border border-[#E2E8F0] object-cover shadow-sm

ai_sidebar.header: flex items-center gap-2 text-[#312E81] font-bold text-lg
ai_sidebar.command_palette_hint: flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border border-[#E2E8F0] bg-white shadow-sm text-sm font-medium text-[#64748B]
ai_sidebar.quick_action_btn: w-full text-left px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-[#E2E8F0] bg-white hover:border-[#2563EB] hover:shadow-sm transition-all text-sm font-semibold text-[#475569] flex items-center gap-3 group

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a unified Dashboard view utilizing the provided colors. Map the primary background to #F8FAFC, and cards to pure #FFFFFF.
Do not use generic SaaS fonts (Inter/Roboto). Use 'Manrope' for headings and 'Public Sans' for body text (already imported in index.css).
Implement the Funnel Bar at the top of the main view (Leads, Assessments, PAs, Proposals, Cases, Closed) making sure they are clickable.
Each Card must display a 7-step tracker (7 small horizontal pill-shaped divs). Fill them according to a mock progress state.
On Card hover, slightly lift the card and tint the border to Electric Blue (#2563EB).
The Right panel is fixed and sticky, acting as an AI command center. Add a mock input for Cmd+K command palette.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Build a mock quick drill-in Drawer (using Shadcn Sheet component) that triggers on card click to show details.
No purple gradients. Maintain high-contrast, crisp UI suitable for $50k+ transactions.
